titleStmt.title: SII 23.596: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 596. (A.R. No. 596 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah district Saumyanātha temple—In the same place Rājarāja III. Year 23 and 24

summary.p: This records a gift of 6 māḍai and a lampstand each for two perpetual lamps in the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ by a merchant named Śemmāseṭṭi of Muraṇōttamaṅgalam in Vaḷḷuva-nāḍu a division of Malai-maṇḍalam, and his wife Uṇṇippiḷḷai Akkaṉ, one made in Hēviḷambi, Kumbha, ba. 6, Saturday, Svāti, and the other a year later in Vikāri, Tulā ba. 3, Monday, Mṛigaśīrsha corresponding respectively to A.D. 1238, February 6, f.d.t. ·05, and to A.D. 1239, October 17, f.d.n. ·11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . rājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3
Āvatāṉa hemaḷampi samvaṟcarattuk ku
mbha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum caṉi
kkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ niranta
ṉūrakarattuk kulottuṅka coḻa vi
ṇṇakar Emperumāṉ cokkap
perumāḷukku malaimaṇṭalattu vaḷ
ḷuvanāṭṭu muraṇottamaṅkalattu
varttakaṉ cemmāceṭṭiyār nittam
Oru tirunantā viḷakku cantrādittavarai ce
llakkaṭavatākap poliyūṭṭāka
Iṭṭa māṭai Āṟu tirukkuttu viḷak
ku Oṉṟu rāja[rāja*]devaṟku 2 10 4Āvatu
vikāri samvaṟcarattut tulāṉāya
ṟ ṟaparapakṣattu tritiyaiyun tiṅkaṭ
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣattu nā
ḷ meṟpaṭi ceṭṭiyār bhāryai Uṇ
ṇippiḷḷai Akkaṉ Iṉṉāḷ mutal I
c cokkap perumāḷukkuc cantrādi
ttavarai nittamoru tiruṉantāviḷa
kkuc cellukaikkup poliyūṭṭā
ka Iṭṭa māṭai Āṟu tirukkuttu viḷa
kku Oṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 23.596 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
